name: comm-modes
description: Output-style modes (caveman ~75% token-saving terse mode) and skill-authoring meta-tools with Pneumora plugin conventions. Adapted from mattpocock/skills.

interface.shortDescription: Caveman terse mode + write-a-skill meta with Pneumora conventions.
interface.longDescription: Two skills focused on how the agent communicates and how new skills get authored. Caveman mode cuts ~75% tokens by stripping articles, fillers, and pleasantries while keeping technical accuracy; persists until the user says 'stop caveman'. Write-a-skill is a meta-skill that walks through authoring a new SKILL.md, with appended Pneumora conventions covering scripts/new-plugin.sh, dual manifests, and Codex agent metadata. Adapted from Matt Pocock's skills repository (MIT).
defaultPrompt: Use $comm-modes to switch to caveman mode and cut my response tokens.
Use $comm-modes to author a new skill following the Pneumora plugin conventions.
